title: berlandiera texana var. betonicifolia
intro: Berlandiera texana var. betonicifolia, also known as the betonique or desert honeysuckle, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, sore throats, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Berlandiera texana var. betonicifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. Berlandiera texana var. betonicifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for different applications and uses in traditional medicine and natural health practices.
